content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Shuffle Hashing". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1278/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains two integers n and m. The next line contains n integers a1, a2, ..., an. The next line contains m integers b1, b2, ..., bm.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print 'Yes' if it's possible to get the same hash value for both arrays after some operations, otherwise print 'No'.

solution.approach: Check if the sum of elements in both arrays is equal and if the sum of squares of elements in both arrays is equal.

code.Python3:
for _ in range(int(input())):
    n, m = map(int, input().split())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = list(map(int, input().split()))
    sumA = sum(a)
    sumB = sum(b)
    sumSqA = sum(i * i for i in a)
    sumSqB = sum(i * i for i in b)
    if sumA == sumB and sumSqA == sumSqB:
        print('Yes')
    else:
        print('No')
